title: dianthus × calalpinus
intro: Dianthus × calalpinus, also known as mountain pink or alpine pink, is a hybrid perennial flowering plant that belongs to the carnation family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Dianthus × calalpinus include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems such as bronchitis and coughs. Herbal preparations of the plant, including teas and infusions, can be made by drying and infusing the flowers or leaves in hot water, and can be used to treat various health conditions.
